title: Family Law | The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen Serves California
content:
### Your Family’s Journey, Our Legal Compass
"Together We Go Further"
At Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we care about our clients and the struggles they are facing. When life needs to change, we work closely with our clients to navigate the legal options available to them, working to minimize their risk of making decisions without having all of the insight into the legal options available to them. Our team is dedicated to working closely with you – one step at a time – to navigate family law in Los Angeles and the surrounding area. Contact us for insight, information, and guidance you can rely on.
With years of experience, our team has developed strategies to help facilitate the best possible outcomes for our clients. We work hard to analyze the situation, offer insight, and then work to negotiate an agreement between parties when that is possible. When needed, we will go to court to fight for our clients and their goals. If you are facing big life decisions, whether that involves adoption, child support and custody, or divorce, ensure you have a highly trusted and experienced attorney by your side to guide and support you through the legal process.
You can depend on our experience and dedication to our clients at the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen. We work hard to ensure that we offer all of the technology and efficiencies possible to minimize the risk that you will have any delays. Turn to our experienced family law attorneys for help in Los Angeles County, Orange County, Riverside County, and San Bernardino County.

### Other Practice Areas
"I can't say enough good things about Adam and his staff. As soon as I met him I knew I would be taken care of. He made getting a divorce as easy as one could expect and was very good at keeping me up to date with new developments and accurate timelines. Great communicator and very good at making things simple. I would definitely recommend him especially if you are trying to keep things civil."
"I wish I could give them 10 Stars... because they gave 10 Star service from beginning to end... they are there for you and fight for you like you are friends and family... Shout out to Adam, Tiffany, Rachel and Gilbert and all the other associates that helped me with my case. Adam and his team will always comfort you whenever you are in doubt and they always follow up with you if you any questions or concerns. Great professional service for sure. I am so glad I was referred to the Law Offices of Adam Nguyen. I highly recommend them to everyone."
"I am very glad I chose this firm for my child custody. Atty. Adam and his team, Gilbert, the paralegal in particular were so patient with me during my times of need, where I felt scared and lost and had no idea where to even begin because of the thought of losing my daughter consumed me. They really listened, communicative, were caring but tough and knew the ins and outs of family law which is what I truly needed. I'm so glad of the outcome. I am highly satisfied and completely recommend this firm."
Adoption can be one of the most exciting times of your life. Let Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen be by your side throughout the process. We work closely with our clients to provide them with insight into their legal options and rights throughout adoption. Let us ensure that you know what to expect.
Whether you are adopting a child in need, a stepchild, or a family member, allow our adoption attorney in Los Angeles County to offer insight and guidance to you on the proceedings. We can help ensure your rights remain protected throughout the legal process. Set up a consultation with us today to learn more.
Alimony may be the right of some spouses, and pursuing fair alimony awards is critical to the future financial security of both spouses. At the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we know this can be a challenging and complicated legal topic. Let us help you navigate alimony laws in California, especially if you do not agree with the awards already assigned.
At the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, our alimony attorney in California, we will guide and support you as you navigate your legal rights and obligations. We can offer insight into changing or challenging alimony awards while helping you to make adjustments when life circumstances change. Set up a consultation with our alimony attorney in California now to learn how we can help you.

### Child custody & visitation
Child custody matters are some of the most heated decisions, and with good reason. California law is very specific about supporting equal interaction between both parents and their child or children when it is in the best interest of the child. Our goal is to help you to ensure your rights are heard and that your child receives the care and attention they deserve.
At the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we work with clients on all aspects of child custody and visitation. That includes providing insight into the legal strategies available to help you make changes to existing legal agreements and navigate any obstacles that may have limited you in the past. We are aggressive in pursuing what our clients need while also working to educate you on your legal options. Set up a consultation with us today to learn more about how we can guide you.
Child support is a legal, financial responsibility of both parents under California state law in most cases. The court uses a complex method to determine who should pay child support as well as how much is owed. There are also many times when initial awards may be changed due to changing circumstances. At the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we work with clients to help them navigate all aspects of this process, including getting a better understanding of their rights to child support and adjustments.
Contact our child support attorney serving Los Angeles County and the surrounding areas for a consultation. Allow us to help you establish or modify child support awards under California’s legal system.

### Child support modification & enforcement
As child support modification and enforcement attorneys in California, the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen have helped many people to seek out legal support for some of the most complicated areas of the law. Child support modification is often necessary when circumstances change, but it is not an automatic process. If you believe the current award is too little or too much, we can help you pursue a better outcome.
In addition, our child support attorneys can also help with navigating support enforcement. It is legally required for parents to meet the award requirements set by the court, but there are some situations where this does not happen. It is our goal to work with you to pursue legal actions that could protect your rights. Contact us for a consultation today.
Divorce is an area of family law that comes with numerous decisions. You and your soon-to-be-ex may be able to come to an agreement on some matters or none at all. We encourage our clients to try to negotiate outcomes and work closely with them to achieve this – but only when it is in their best interest. We will work aggressively to help you set up your future life with your best interest in mind.
Allow our divorce attorneys to help you navigate some of the biggest concerns you have, including asset division, retirement division, child custody and decision making, and much more. Do not wait to have your own legal representation in California for these matters.

### Juvenile delinquency & dependency proceedings
Turn to the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen for all aspects of juvenile delinquency and dependency proceedings. For parents, these can be difficult situations with numerous obstacles to limit their ability to protect their children. You want the best for your child, and we do as well. That is why we work hard with our clients to create legal strategies that enable the best possible outcome when minors make mistakes.
Your child’s future is on the line, no matter what has happened. Our juvenile delinquency attorneys will work passionately to protect you and them from the most significant impacts. Turn to us for immediate help and guidance when your child needs help.
Mediation can often solve many of the most complicated legal battles in family law when there is fairness, compassion, and reliable legal representation present. Turn to the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen for immediate help in each of these areas. With years of experience, we are committed to working closely with our clients to pursue the best possible outcome.
Mediation is an opportunity to preserve the decision making process and keep a judge from interfering in your life. Yet, it takes a solid understanding of your rights and obligations to move forward. Allow our mediation attorneys in Los Angeles County, California, to guide you. Contact us for a consultation now.

### Your Family’s Journey, Our Legal Compass
Schedule a consultation with The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen to address your family law matters. Our professional team is dedicated to providing personalized and effective legal solutions. Contact us today to discuss your case and receive the guidance and support you need.
